description: Perform forensic analysis on '/home/ga/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' to isolate the TCP conversation with the highest data transfer. Annotate the first packet of this conversation with 'Evidence Start' and the last packet with 'Evidence End', then export only this annotated conversation to '/home/ga/Documents/captures/evidence_annotated.pcapng' in pcapng format.
